clocks.X1026_138_ZN: CLK_A (posedge, controls MI1_QT[0] and X1805/X1806 group)
clocks.X1027_138_ZN: CLK_B (posedge, controls MI1_QT[1] and all other internal FFs)

resets.X3_323_Z: RST_MAIN (active-low, async clear for most FFs)
resets.X1676_Z: RST_AUX  (active-low, async clear for X1795, X1798, X1800)

selects.X8710_Z: SEL_A  (S=1 → load D1; controls CLK_A FFs + X1800/X1801-X1804/X1849)
selects.X412_46_Z: SEL_B  (S=1 → load D1; controls X412-domain FFs)

data_inputs.DT[0]: serial load source for X1806 (B-group bit10) via SEL_A
data_inputs.DT[1]: serial load source for X1798 (A-group bit8) via SEL_B

set_preload.MI44_Q[3:0]: preload data value for SET operations

output_select.CTRL0: MI1_SUM path select: 0=raw sum bits, 1=carry-propagated sum
output_select.CTRL1: carry/sum path select bit 1 (affects D0 logic for FFs)
output_select.CTRL2: carry/sum path select bit 2 (affects D0 logic for FFs)

outputs.MI1_SUM[11:1]: sum of two 11-bit internal operands A+B (bits 11:1)

ff_to_operand_mapping_CTRL0_eq_0.MI1_SUM_note: MI1_SUM[11:1] = (A + B)[11:1], bit 0 of sum is dropped
